info.name: Pureplay Analytics Ingest
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Pureplay multi-vendor golf shot ingestion service.

Base URL: http://localhost:3000

Happy-path webhook requests use pre-request scripts to generate timestamps dynamically so
the collection never rots. Error tests (400, 422) use fixed stale dates.

## Auth
In dev with WEBHOOK_AUTH_MODE=none no header is needed for webhooks.
Query/stats/identity endpoints require Authorization: Bearer {{internal_api_key}}.

item.name: Webhooks — TrackPro
item.description: Single-shot ingest. Happy-path requests use pre-request scripts for fresh timestamps.

item.name: Webhooks — SwingMetric
item.description: Batch ingest. Happy-path requests generate ts_ms dynamically via pre-request scripts.

item.name: POST /v1/webhooks/swingmetric — V1 retransmit shot 1 (same ts_ms → idempotent)
POST /v1/webhooks/swingmetric — V2 batch (club / launch_angle / carry_yd / offline_yd)
Webhooks — ProSwing
item.description: Single-shot ingest. V1/V2/V3 formats. Pre-request scripts generate fresh occurred_at.

item.name: POST /v1/webhooks/proswing — V3 (player+device envelope, launch_angle scalar, spin_rpm)
